operational_knowledge_units.title: Tote presence and empty rack color indicators in Container Selection
operational_knowledge_units.summary: In the Container Selection tote view, dark blue indicates the presence of a tote, while light blue represents an empty rack. Selecting a tote location shows a box icon and the tote number.
observed_evidence: Slide text states: 'Dark blue indicates the presence of a tote. While light blue represents empty rack.'
Slide text states: 'If you select it, a box icon will show as well as the tote number.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Container Selection Totes UI reference: dark blue means a tote is present, light blue means the rack is empty. Selecting the tote/location displays a box icon and the tote number.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Tote lookup by tote number and location display
operational_knowledge_units.summary: Users can search for a tote by typing in the tote number. If the tote exists in the system, the interface can identify whether it is located on a rack or on an AGV.
observed_evidence: Slide text states: 'You can also find a tote by typing the number in and selecting the rack or AGV it’s located on if its in the system.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Tote lookup in Container Selection: type in the tote number to find a tote. If it is in the system, the UI can show whether the tote is located on a rack or on an AGV.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Find a tote in Container Selection by tote number
preconditions: User has access to the Container Selection tote view.
The tote exists in the system for location results to be shown.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide describes tote color indicators and says a tote can be found by typing the tote number; the location may be shown on a rack or AGV.

steps.instruction: In the Container Selection tote interface, type in the tote number.
steps.expected_outcome: The system attempts to locate the tote by its number.
steps.validation_check: A matching tote result or location indication appears if the tote is in the system.

steps.instruction: Select the rack or AGV where the tote is located, if the tote is found in the system.
steps.expected_outcome: The tote's location is identified on the corresponding rack or AGV.
steps.validation_check: The selected rack or AGV corresponds to the located tote.
steps.visual_region_hint: Rack or AGV selection area in Container Selection

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Procedure candidate for locating a tote in Container Selection: enter the tote number, then select the rack or AGV where it is located if the tote exists in the system.
